summary: Iteration 161: Nexus Passes Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 18/18 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: All UI elements verified. Nexus Passes allow temporary layer upgrades with Cosmic Dust. Active Void Pass confirmed with countdown timer, PASS badge in layer bar, and 2.5x loot multiplier applied to mining rewards.
seed_data_creation: User has active Void Pass (expires ~04:32 UTC), resonance=14 (natural layer: Ethereal), dust balance ~1714 after mining
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nexus Passes feature fully implemented and tested. Three pass types: Astral Pass (200 dust, 60min, astral layer, 1.7x), Void Pass (500 dust, 60min, void layer, 2.5x), Nexus Pass (1200 dust, 30min, nexus layer, 3.0x). Key endpoints: GET /api/game-core/passes (returns available_passes, active_pass, cosmic_dust, natural_layer), POST /api/game-core/passes/purchase (deducts dust, activates pass). Pass overrides natural layer from resonance. Only one pass active at a time. Shop modal shows 'Pass already active' when pass is active. Key data-testids: active-pass-banner, layer-bar, open-pass-shop, pass-shop-modal, buy-{pass_id}. User currently has Void Pass active with ~50 minutes remaining.

GET /api/game-core/passes returns availa.details: Returns available_passes array with id, name, cost_dust, duration_minutes, target_layer, can_afford

GET /api/game-core/passes returns active.details: Returns active_pass with pass_id, pass_name, target_layer, expires_at when pass is active

GET /api/game-core/passes returns dust b.details: Returns cosmic_dust field with user's current balance

GET /api/game-core/passes returns natura.details: Returns natural_layer based on user's resonance stat

POST /api/game-core/passes/purchase fail.details: Returns 400 with 'already have an active pass' message
User can afford all available passes - cannot test insufficient dust
Passes below natural layer are not offered in available_passes

GET /api/game-core/stats returns layer w.details: Returns layer.active_pass with pass details when pass is active

GET /api/game-core/stats active_layer re.details: active_layer equals pass target_layer (void) instead of natural_layer (ethereal)

GET /api/game-core/stats includes natura.details: Returns natural_layer showing base layer from resonance

GET /api/rock-hounding/mine returns laye.details: Returns layer with active_layer=void when Void Pass is active

POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action uses.details: Returns layer with loot_multiplier=2.5 and xp_multiplier=2.0 for Void layer

Frontend: Active Pass Banner with countd.details: Shows 'Void Pass Active' with live countdown (50:35 remaining)

Frontend: Universe Layer bar shows PASS.details: Layer bar shows 'Void PASS 2.5x loot' with Void segment highlighted

Frontend: Void segment highlighted in la.details: Void layer segment is highlighted red (pass-activated)

Frontend: Nexus Passes button visible.details: Button with data-testid='open-pass-shop' visible at bottom of mine tab

Frontend: Pass shop modal opens.details: Modal with data-testid='pass-shop-modal' opens on button click

Frontend: Modal shows 'Pass already acti.details: Modal displays 'Pass already active. Wait for it to expire before buying another.'

Frontend: Mine action shows layer-multip.details: Mining shows +400 XP, +375 Dust with Void 2.5x multiplier (Legendary Emerald)
